name: pr_cep_acc_drain_updel_plainsrc_stream
drl: rule W when accumulate( E(tag == "x"); $c : count() ) then end
_finding: D-160 SCOPE GUARD (stream cell): a PLAIN-typed source in a STREAM session (event types elsewhere) also stays SILENT - the per-entry net-zero re-fire is a property of EVENT-TYPED sources, not of session mode. Gates the fix on the source type, not event_specs.is_empty().
